'''Bseto I''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] [[Bseto]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was a rocky, desert planet, and located in the [[Bseto system/Legends|Bseto system]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|6|Rendezvous with Destiny|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
